task: Verify presence/absence of Wisconsin-specific addendum in WI 637918 filing
method: grep _pagetext/*.txt for 'Wisconsin'/'WISCONSIN'; enumerate state addenda in Exhibit P (pp 706-801)

result.interpretation: BK is registered in WI per HI addendum's state list (p786), but no state-specific Wisconsin addendum is included in Exhibit P. WI registration is satisfied via filing only, not via per-state contract overrides.
